prompt: 这周 deep work 才做了 12 小时，已经周四了，还有救吗？上周的 P0 是 zero sleep debt，P1 是 personal-os infra

assertions.name: remaining-capacity
assertions.text: Response calculates remaining deep work capacity for Thu-Sun (approximately 4 days left in the week)

assertions.name: honest-assessment
assertions.text: Response honestly assesses whether 30h weekly target is reachable (it likely isn't from 12h at Thursday)

assertions.name: revised-plan
assertions.text: Response proposes a concrete revised plan for the remaining days of the week

assertions.name: goal-tracking
assertions.text: Response addresses the P0 (zero sleep debt) and P1 (personal-os infra) objectives and their current status

assertions.name: reads-weekly-report
assertions.text: Response references data from the previous week's report or current week's daily logs

assertions.name: supportive-tone
assertions.text: Response frames the situation supportively rather than punitively (not 'you failed' but 'here's how to make the most of remaining time')
